title: Legal Terms
prevails: Note: These Terms are governed by Spanish law. In case of any discrepancy between language versions, the Spanish version prevails.

s1.title: 1. Service Description
s1.p1: Rosa XOXO is an exclusive adult digital content subscription service. It includes access to a private Telegram channel with photos, videos and intimate content, and, in the annual plan, personalised written explicit chats by appointment (max. 2 per month).
s1.p2: The service is entirely digital and text-based. It does not include voice calls, video calls, audio messages, in-person meetings or any physical contact.

s2.title: 2. Age Verification and Adult Content
s2.p1: This site contains sexually explicit material intended exclusively for people over 18 years of age. By subscribing you declare under your own responsibility that you are of legal age in your country of residence. The service provider reserves the right to suspend any subscription upon evidence of use by a minor.

s3.title: 3. Plans, Prices and Renewal
s3.i1: Monthly Plan (€3.50/month): access to the private channel. Automatic renewal every 30 days.
s3.i2: Annual Plan (€30/year): includes the above plus personalised written chats by appointment (max. 2/month). Automatic renewal every 365 days.
s3.i3: Payment is charged at the time of subscription.
s3.i4: Access is conditional on maintaining an active subscription.

s4.title: 4. Personalised Chats (Annual Plan)
s4.i1: Exclusively via written chat on Telegram.
s4.i2: Require prior request with at least 24 hours' notice.
s4.i3: Maximum 2 sessions per month. Non-cumulative and non-transferable.
s4.i4: The service provider may end the session in the event of disrespectful conduct.
s4.i5: Do not include calls, video calls, audio messages or illegal content.

s5.title: 5. Service Limitations
s5.p1: The Rosa XOXO service does not include:
s5.i5: Physical contact or activities outside the digital sphere.
s5.i6: Illegal content or content involving minors.
s5.p2: Any request outside these limits will be rejected and may result in immediate cancellation without refund.

s6.title: 6. Cancellation and No-Refund Policy
s6.i1: You can cancel at any time via the Stripe portal.
s6.i2: The subscription remains active until the end of the already-paid period.
s6.i3: No refunds are made once access to the service has begun, in accordance with Spanish consumer law (art. 103.m LGDCU).
s6.i4: Exceptions will be considered when the service could not be provided due to reasons attributable to the service provider.

s7.title: 7. User Prohibitions
s7.i1: Reproducing, distributing or sharing any service content without the service provider's written consent.
s7.i2: Capturing or recording private conversations for distribution.
s7.i3: Harassing, threatening or blackmailing the service provider.
s7.i5: Using the service with or in the presence of minors.
s7.p1: Violation may result in civil and criminal liability, as well as immediate suspension.

s8.title: 8. Intellectual Property
s8.p1: All Rosa XOXO content is the exclusive property of the service provider or is duly licensed. The user does not acquire any intellectual property rights to the content, and its use is limited to personal, private and non-transferable enjoyment for the duration of the subscription.
s8.p2: Personalised chats and conversations are strictly private and confidential for both parties.

s9.title: 9. Data Protection (GDPR)
s9.p1: All data collected through the service is considered personal data and is processed in full compliance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable Spanish data protection law (LOPDGDD).
s9.i2: Data processed: email, billing data provided to Stripe and the content of Telegram conversations.
s9.i3: Purpose: subscription management, service provision and improvement, and related communications.
s9.i4: Legal basis: performance of the subscription contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) and your explicit consent (Arts. 6.1.a and 9.2.a GDPR) for the processing of data relating to sexual life, considered a special category.
s9.i5: Processors: Stripe, Inc. (PCI-DSS) and Telegram Messenger. No card data is stored by Rosa XOXO.
s9.i6: Retention: for the duration of the subscription and applicable legal periods; subsequently erased or blocked.
s9.i7: Security measures: appropriate technical and organisational measures are applied to the risk of the processing.
s9.i8: International transfers: those carried out by Stripe and Telegram are provided with adequate safeguards under the GDPR.
s9.i9: Disclosure: data is not shared with third parties except as required by law.
s9.i10: Rights: access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction and portability.

s10.title: 10. Jurisdiction
s10.p1: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute, the parties submit to the competent courts of the consumer's place of domicile.
